name: Leonardo Moretti || Cruel Fiancé v.2
description:
I died a hundred times



You go back to her and I go back to black



Your fiancé doesn't love you.

Leonardo Moretti is well known for his good looks, critical mind, and utter loyalty to the Moretti's.

He's also your fiancé-- not that he wants to be.

Marrying you means securing crucial ties for the Moretti Crime Syndicate--

and bolsters his older brother, Matteo's play to inherit the position of Don from their father instead of their upstart half brother Nicolo.

But Leo's heart belongs to another--

a Russian socialite named Mischa.

He'll be the proper husband in front of your families--

but he's made one thing very clear--

Mischa is the only lover who matters to him.

Not you.

Not at all.


A year ago today, I posted the fourth bot in a little series about some trash mafia brothers. At the time I'd barely made a splash on janitor, and while the series had some success, I was relatively unknown.

I had the idea for Leo while listening to Amy Winehouse and thinking about what happens when personal and professional lines blur in a family business-- and what duty vs love looked like.

I didn't think much when I posted him but then Leo did something I never expected. He blew up-- and became my best bot. He still is at 2.8m and he continues to be my most polarizing and simultaneously beloved character.

I never expected anything like Leo to happen-- nor did I expect a year later to be 20k+ over where I was.

I truly want to thank everyone who has ever used Leo, and all my little creations. I feel very lucky I get to share my creative work in a way I never thought I would get to.

Leo is very special to me, even if is is a trash can of a man. I remember sitting in Paris last year, stunned to see he'd taken the no. 1 spot on trending for a few days-- something that seemed like it only happened in dreams.

So for Leo's one year anniversary, I've decided to rework his original bot utilizing scripts and tweaking his intro. And yes-- that means there's a progressive relationship script on Leo.

Which means it's time for Leo on hard mode, cuties.

I could keep yapping here but instead I'll just say this again;

Thank you, for being here, for finding joy in my work, I am forever grateful.

REMINDERS with Leo:
☆ Do not leave me violent comments. I will delete them.
☆ Do not leave me comments about Lord of the Mysteries. The name is purely a coincidence and I will delete your comments. .
☆ I will delete comments about Mischa's name. I know it is typically a male name, however when I initially named her several
creator: m00nprincess
